locked_decisions: Excel lama reference only, bukan import production.
Jangan campur numbering Wehdah, Persada, Virtue Damsel, Nas Ceria.
Workspace asal kosong, bina sistem baru.

taxonomy_rules.thermal_60mm: Print layout/artifact for receipts; not automatically a separate legal document type.
taxonomy_rules.refund_note: Not full v1 UI unless later approved; keep metadata/schema ready only.
taxonomy_rules.self_billed_invoice: Not full v1 UI unless later approved; keep metadata/schema ready only.

numbering_policy.rule: Each company + document_type has its own policy and sequence.
numbering_policy.allocation: Official numbers are allocated only when status changes to issued.
numbering_policy.preview: Preview is a format example only and never reserves a sequence.
numbering_policy.manual_override: Future-only draft/next-policy setup may be editable; issued official numbers are immutable.

renderer_decision.reason: Excel-style A4 matching, artwork placement, repeated headers, and visual regression are not reliable enough with DomPDF.
renderer_decision.dompdf_status: temporary legacy fallback only until Chromium renderer is implemented and verified

amount_in_words.snapshot_rule: Generated text is snapshotted on issue and never recomputed for old issued documents.

placement_rules.Wehdah Solution: Near existing RM/amount-in-words section before or near Grand Total.
placement_rules.Nas Ceria Services: Near total footer, outside item table.
placement_rules.Persada Gemilang Global: Near grand total/payment section matching INV 1 layout.
placement_rules.thermal_60mm: Hidden by default unless explicitly enabled.

a4.no_overlap_rule: No item row may overlap totals, footer, signature, or stamp.

pagination_behavior.wehdah_artwork_order: Main document pages first, artwork pages after all main pages.
pagination_behavior.delivery_order_price_visibility: Prices hidden when the selected template says price-hidden.

must_reject: same idempotency key with different request hash

pdf_download.rule: Authorized and company scoped; no raw storage paths exposed.

phase_order: R0 evidence freeze and gate artifacts
